goal: 在远端机器粘贴失败，查看或增加关键日志并打包签名 dmg

summary.title: 为远端粘贴链路增加诊断日志并打包签名 DMG
summary.what: 新增统一 OSLog logger，覆盖快捷键监听、辅助功能权限、焦点终端/TTY 会话匹配、剪贴板图片导出、远端复制命令执行、路径回写与合成粘贴等关键步骤；同时让 SSH wrapper 写入 ~/.xcopy/logs/ssh-wrapper.log，并在 README 中补充查看日志的方法。已生成 Developer ID 签名的 dist/XCopy.dmg。
summary.why: 远端机器粘贴失败时原先缺少足够证据判断失败点，需要能够区分是快捷键未触发、权限不足、未匹配远端会话、剪贴板无图片、上传失败，还是最后 Command-V 回灌失败。
summary.user_goal: 在远端机器粘贴失败，查看或增加关键日志并打包签名 dmg

decisions.chose: 使用系统 OSLog 按 clipboard/shortcut/session/shell-integration/transfer 分类记录 App 内关键路径
decisions.rationale: 不引入额外依赖，能用 log stream 直接复现和过滤，同时适合签名打包后的 macOS app。
rejected: 只把错误显示在 UI 上，无法覆盖被静默忽略的快捷键和匹配失败路径

decisions.rationale: wrapper 运行在用户 shell 进程中，不属于 App 进程，单靠 App OSLog 看不到目标提取、TTY、session 文件创建/删除等信息。

decisions.chose: 用本机 Developer ID Application 证书签名 app 和 DMG
decisions.rationale: 满足签名 DMG 诉求；未做 notarization，因为没有提供/配置公证凭据。

review_notes: 验证：XCOPY_CODESIGN_IDENTITY="Developer ID Application: Defei Kong (4U87V5XYY4)" ./script/package_dmg.sh 通过。
验证：codesign --verify --deep --strict dist/dmg-root/XCopy.app 和 codesign --verify dist/XCopy.dmg 通过。
spctl -t open dist/XCopy.dmg 返回 rejected/source=Insufficient Context，说明已签名但未公证。

architectural_claims: App diagnostics now route through a shared AppLog helper backed by OSLog with Bundle.main.bundleIdentifier fallback.
SSH wrapper diagnostics are file-based because they execute outside the app process.
behavioral_changes: Logs are emitted when shortcuts are captured, ignored, matched, or converted into synthetic Command-V.
Logs are emitted for accessibility/event tap startup failures, clipboard image checks/exports, session registry misses/decoding failures, and remote copy command status/output.
First-launch or manual shell integration install now writes a wrapper that records target extraction, TTY, session file lifecycle, and ssh exit code.
security_implications: Diagnostic logs include public host names, paths, command strings, and remote copy output to support debugging; they should not be treated as secret-free if custom commands include sensitive material.
migration_notes: Existing users need the updated app to reinstall shell integration so ~/.xcopy/bin/xcopy includes wrapper file logging.
